surface: lib/runtime/mcp/error-taxonomy.ts — createCleanMcpFailureTaxonomy derives every MCP error envelope from the Core FailureTaxonomy entry for the resolved failure kind; LEGACY_ERROR_CODE_FAILURE_KINDS maps plugin-owned error codes onto registry failureKinds; codes carrying core.failure.* ids resolve directly.
proof: test/unit/McpErrorRegistryAdoption.test.ts — every mapped code resolves through the live createCleanMcpError path to a failureKind present in the pinned registry; drift against the vendor registry fails the suite.

pluginOwnedCodeMappings.CODEX_ALEMBIC_KNOWLEDGE_REQUIRED: deferred (knowledge-gate family; mapping to capability-mismatch is correct but changes the parity-pinned alembic_health snapshot — enact with the next parity-budgeted wave)
pluginOwnedCodeMappings.CODEX_AUTO_INIT_FAILED: internal-error (fallback, deliberate: failed initialization is an internal failure)

recipeEvidenceGateCodeMappings.rule: Evidence-gate and repair-loop rejections are caller-repairable input-quality failures; consent gates are confirmation-required; scope mismatches are conflicts. They must not fall back to internal-error.

coreRegistryRowNote: Core's adoption.alembicPlugin row still says deferred-ic5; updating that row lives in AlembicCore (registry authority) — routed to the Core window, not edited from here.
